commands.review_summary:
The PR enables `eslint/no-underscore-dangle` in `.oxlintrc.json`, removes the oxlint wrapper suppression, updates wrapper-policy tests, and removes one unnecessary `String()` conversion in a Mantis evidence test.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is lint-policy cleanup, not a runtime bug. The changed behavior is verifiable through the supported oxlint wrapper path and the PR body includes after-patch live output.

target.title: chore(lint): enable no-underscore-dangle with comprehensive allow list
target.body:
## Summary

- Enable `eslint/no-underscore-dangle` in `.oxlintrc.json` with the current allow list for established underscore-prefixed identifiers
- Remove the wrapper-level `--allow eslint/no-underscore-dangle` override so supported lint commands enforce the config rule
- Update wrapper policy tests and fix one existing type-conversion lint violation exposed by the full wrapper run

Part of #80504.

## Verification

### Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: supported OpenClaw oxlint wrapper now enforces `eslint/no-underscore-dangle` through `.oxlintrc.json` instead of suppressing the rule in `scripts/run-oxlint.mjs`.

Real environment tested: macOS, Node/pnpm repo checkout.

Exact steps or command run after this patch:
```
node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs test/scripts/local-heavy-check-runtime.test.ts test/scripts/mantis-publish-pr-evidence.test.ts
codex review --base origin/main
```

Evidence after fix:
```
Found 0 warnings and 0 errors.
Finished in 21.2s on 14837 files with 217 rules using 1 threads.

Test Files  2 passed (2)
Tests  31 passed (31)

Codex review: No actionable correctness issues found in the diff.
```

Observed result after fix: The supported oxlint wrapper passes without the wrapper-level no-underscore-dangle suppression, and the wrapper tests assert the override is gone.

What was not tested: full `pnpm check`; CI validates the remaining lanes.
